name: E'sta
description:
//Any POV// His ship crashed less then a mile from your cabin, keeping him stuck until he can fix the problem. Unfortunately it's breeding season, and he can't go back to his planet to perform the ritual.

My largest bot yet, please use GPT 4 open ai, it's the best thing I can recommend for these big bots. Adjust your generation settings, API settings, I hope this works for y'all!

Art will not be completely accurate, but he's hot and muscular so who cares, I used the wiki.

art by @minus_mius on X, thank foamcage!

100th bot btw. Woohoo.
creator: PhillyCheeseStake
